It is also known as the 'Wild Ginger' or 'Lesser Ginger' due to its similarities with the common ginger. The plant's classification is an area of ongoing research and refinement in the botanical community.
uses: Setiacis diffusa, also known as creeping Jenny or golden moneywort, has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits.
